meta.source: Synthea Patient Generator v3.3.0 (synthetic demo data)
meta.note: All data is entirely synthetic and fictional. No real patient data.

resource.notes: Patient is well-controlled on current regimen. Encourage continued dietary compliance. Next HbA1c in 3 months.
Complex patient with CAD, HTN, T2DM, and CKD2. Avoid NSAIDs. Renal function stable. Cardiology managing stent follow-up.
Asthma well-controlled on current ICS/SABA regimen. Remind patient to carry rescue inhaler. Spirometry stable.
Ex-smoker (quit 2013). COPD GOLD stage 2. BP slightly elevated - consider medication adjustment. Knee arthroscopy deferred.
Migraine frequency reduced with topiramate. TSH therapeutic. Depression improving on sertraline - consider dose review in 3 months.

conditions.display: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction

resource.notes: EF 35%, compensated on current regimen. CKD3 stable. SGLT2i added for cardioprotection. Daily weight monitoring advised. Low-sodium diet counseling completed.
Seizure-free for 8 years on levetiracetam. B12 improving with supplementation. Continue current AED - no changes needed. Driving restriction lifted 2022.
Excellent glycemic control with CGM and closed-loop pump. Strictly gluten-free diet. HbA1c trending down. Last hypo episode resolved with glucagon.
RA well-controlled on MTX + HCQ combination. ESR normalized. LFTs within normal range. Continue current DMARDs. Chest X-ray annually for MTX monitoring.
PCOS managed with lifestyle modification and metformin. Anemia improving with iron supplementation. Anxiety well-controlled. Discussing fertility options.
Prostate cancer - biochemical remission on ADT + enzalutamide. PSA undetectable. Bone density monitoring annually for ADT side effects.
SCD HbSS. Hydroxyurea and voxelotor providing benefit. Hemoglobin baseline 8.5-9.5 g/dL. Avoid dehydration and temperature extremes. Renal function being monitored.
Child-Pugh B cirrhosis. Abstinent for 2 years. MELD score 12. Listed for transplant evaluation. Dietary sodium restriction < 2g/day. No hepatocellular carcinoma on last imaging.
RRMS stable on natalizumab - no new lesions on latest MRI. EDSS 2.5. JC virus antibody positive - monitoring frequency increased. Depression well-managed on duloxetine.
Crohn's partially controlled on adalimumab + azathioprine. Calprotectin elevated. Discussing biologic switch vs dose escalation. Fistula healing. Low iron - monitor.
Pediatric patient. Atopic triad present. Dupilumab showing excellent response for eczema. EpiPen prescribed for peanut allergy. Asthma action plan given to school.
CKD4 progressing toward ESRD. Dialysis access planning initiated (AV fistula). HbA1c above target. Phosphorus diet restriction. BP requires closer management.

Osteoporosis stable. T-score improved from -3.1 two years ago. Good compliance with alendronate. Depression in full remission - no medications needed. Vitamin supplementation AREDS2 recommended for macular degeneration.
Gout controlled on allopurinol - uric acid at target < 6. Had one flare in July. Lifestyle counseling: limit alcohol, red meat, shellfish. Pre-diabetes - dietary intervention ongoing.
ADHD well-managed on methylphenidate - academic performance improved. Scoliosis stable at 18 degrees - no surgical intervention. Anxiety improved. Continue CBT in parallel with medication.
